instruction: When did the project the house AI thing start? Return only DD-MM-YYYY.
notes: Colloquial descriptor 'the house AI thing' must resolve to Hearthline (household-coordination, linked to entity.nora), not House Mesh (network/infra, literal 'AI' keyword in goal). Workspace reused from t053_project_involvement_partner — same Hearthline/House Mesh ambiguity, different date prefix (04_02 instead of 04_01).
